evals.prompt: How do I set up a cold email campaign in Woodpecker? I need to import prospects, create a multi-step sequence, and start sending.
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guide for creating a Woodpecker cold email campaign covering prospect import, sequence steps with follow-ups, and launch checklist.

assertions.name: campaign_creation
assertions.description: Must explain creating a campaign with condition-based steps, including follow-up steps with delays and the ability to add up to 16 steps per campaign

assertions.name: prospect_import
assertions.description: Must cover at least two methods for adding prospects (manual entry, CSV import, Lead Finder, or API) and mention that Woodpecker includes free email verification via Bouncer

assertions.name: pre_launch_checklist
assertions.description: Must recommend pre-launch steps including connecting mailboxes, enabling warmup for 2+ weeks on new mailboxes, running the spam checker on email copy, and enabling Bounce Shield

evals.prompt: I'm worried about my Woodpecker emails going to spam. Walk me through all the deliverability features I should enable — warmup, Bounce Shield, Adaptive Sending, inbox rotation, the works.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive deliverability configuration guide covering warmup, Bounce Shield, Adaptive Sending, inbox rotation, and domain audit tools.

assertions.name: warmup_config
assertions.description: Must explain the free built-in warmup powered by Mailivery, the ramp schedule up to 50 emails/day, the recommendation to run warmup for 2+ weeks before launching campaigns, and mention the 4 free warmup slots

assertions.name: deliverability_tools
assertions.description: Must cover Bounce Shield (pre-send address validation), Adaptive Sending (auto-throttling based on engagement signals), and ESP Matching as distinct features to enable

assertions.name: inbox_rotation
assertions.description: Must explain inbox rotation for distributing sends across multiple mailboxes, recommend 3+ mailboxes, note that Woodpecker includes unlimited email accounts on all plans, and suggest conservative per-mailbox daily limits of 30-50

evals.prompt: I run a lead gen agency with 8 clients. How do I use Woodpecker's agency panel to manage all of them? I also need API access for automation.
evals.expected_output: Guide to setting up and managing multiple clients via Woodpecker's agency panel with per-client isolation and API access.

assertions.name: agency_pricing
assertions.description: Must state the agency panel add-on cost of EUR 27 per active client per month and calculate the approximate total for 8 clients (EUR 216/mo)

assertions.name: client_isolation
assertions.description: Must explain per-client isolation — separate campaigns, prospects, and mailboxes per client with no data bleed — and the single-dashboard management workflow

assertions.name: agency_api
assertions.description: Must describe the Agency API authentication pattern using the HQ key plus x-company-id header, mention per-company API keys for individual client access, and note the API add-on cost of EUR 20/mo
